comparisonTrackPolicy: both tracks require independent parity gates; harness-controlled freezes identical provider/model/effort/budgets across engines
inputPolicy: closed manifest schema; SHA-256 of the exact prompt/specification and immutable input bundle is shared across engines and signed by the host
isolationPolicy: freeze allowed mechanisms plus exact network/resource policy SHA-256 digests; host and evaluator Ed25519 signatures are reverified after persistence

engines.modelPolicy: freeze provider/model/reasoning effort/tool+step+token budgets and exact arguments per track
freeze provider/model/reasoning effort/tool+step+token budgets and exact arguments per track
freeze provider/model/reasoning effort/tool+step+token budgets and exact arguments per track
freeze provider/model/reasoning effort/tool+step+token budgets and exact arguments per track

externalRequirements: An evaluator independent of Vanguard implementation
A never-run holdout bundle with frozen input-bundle, source, and grader SHA-256 digests
Fresh competitor sessions with pinned CLI versions and identical task/model/budget policy
Provider, model, reasoning effort, tool/step/token budgets, executable/environment digests, and arguments frozen per engine/track
Provider cost assumptions or complete normalized usage for every run
Two independent blinded maintainability reviews per run and evidence-bound third-party adjudication above the disagreement threshold
Signed external container/VM isolation attestation verified against evaluator-owned trust roots
Cluster bootstrap over independent repository groups, never individual repetitions
A pre-registered legacy-Ares control before the Phase 14 adapter can become default-on (not included in the 2,304-run competitive draft)
